company.segment_en: TSMC's single largest customer and lead-node launch buyer — the on-device / edge-AI play that monetizes AI through devices + Services rather than datacenter compute, and uniquely sits OUTSIDE the CoWoS bottleneck
company.segment_zh: 台積電單一最大客戶、也是每個新製程的首發客戶 — 透過裝置＋服務（而非資料中心算力）變現 AI 的「端側／邊緣 AI」標的，且罕見地站在 CoWoS 瓶頸之外
company.blurb_en: Four pillars on TSMC's volume anchor: how Apple raises realized AI value at the EDGE (in-house Apple Silicon value capture · ecosystem lock-in · Apple-Intelligence-gated device mix · Services attach) vs the mixed-reception / partner-dependent drag · what to watch it with · its ~$12B AI-attributable uplift (an estimate; Apple discloses no AI line) · and how ~100% is TSMC N3→N2 leading-edge logic — yet uniquely CoWoS/HBM-light.
company.blurb_zh: 對台積電「量的錨」的四支柱：Apple 怎麼在邊緣提高已實現 AI 價值（自研 Apple Silicon 價值捕獲 · 生態鎖定 · Apple Intelligence 綁定的裝置組合 · 服務附帶）vs 評價兩極／依賴夥伴的拖累 · 用什麼觀察 · 其 ~$12B AI 可歸因增益（估計值；Apple 不揭露 AI 項）· 以及這一切如何幾乎 100% 是台積電 N3→N2 先進邏輯 — 卻罕見地少用 CoWoS／HBM。

thesis_en: Apple is TSMC's volume anchor and the on-device AI play. It does NOT sell compute — it captures AI value at the EDGE: in-house Apple Silicon (A/M-series Neural Engine) lets Apple keep the GPU/NPU margin internally with no merchant markup, while ~2.4B active devices, an Apple-Intelligence-gated upgrade cycle and a ~$100B+ Services franchise convert AI into device mix-shift and attach rather than a per-token price. The honest drag is that Apple Intelligence reception has been mixed, the Siri overhaul slipped, and the frontier leans on a partner (Google Gemini) — so Apple monetizes AI indirectly and cannot price it directly, which is why this reads HOLDING, not RAISING. For TSMC the punchline is structural: Apple is the single largest customer (~25% of revenue) and the lead/launch buyer on every new node (first on N3, first on N2 / A20-M6), yet its AI is integrated SoC + unified LPDDR memory with InFO packaging — essentially NO CoWoS / HBM. Apple is the deepest TSMC relationship of all six lenses, and the only one that sits OUTSIDE the CoWoS bottleneck: it widens TSMC's leading-edge wafer base and funds each node transition, while the CoWoS ceiling that gates NVIDIA/AMD/Broadcom is not Apple's binding constraint.
thesis_zh: Apple 是台積電「量的錨」、也是端側 AI 標的。它不賣算力 — 而是在邊緣捕獲 AI 價值：自研 Apple Silicon（A／M 系列 Neural Engine）讓 Apple 把 GPU／NPU 利潤留在內部、無外購加價，而約 24 億台活躍裝置、由 Apple Intelligence 綁定的換機週期、與年化 $100B+ 的服務事業，把 AI 轉成裝置組合上移與附帶、而非按代幣計價。誠實的拖累是：Apple Intelligence 評價兩極、Siri 改版延後，且前沿仰賴夥伴（Google Gemini）— 因此 Apple 間接變現 AI、無法直接定價，這也是它讀作 HOLDING 而非 RAISING 的原因。對台積電而言重點在結構：Apple 是單一最大客戶（約占營收 25%）、也是每個新製程的首發客戶（N3 第一、N2／A20-M6 第一），但它的 AI 是整合 SoC＋統一 LPDDR 記憶體、InFO 封裝 — 基本上不用 CoWoS／HBM。Apple 是六張鏡頭中與台積電關係最深的一間，也是唯一站在 CoWoS 瓶頸之外的：它擴大台積電先進製程晶圓基底、替每次製程轉進買單，而卡住 NVIDIA／AMD／Broadcom 的 CoWoS 天花板並非 Apple 的綁定約束。

headline.verdict_zh: HOLDING — 已實現價格大致持平

pricing.verdict_zh: HOLDING — 已實現價格大致持平

levers.name_en: In-house Apple Silicon value capture (no merchant-GPU markup)
levers.name_zh: 自研 Apple Silicon 價值捕獲（無外購 GPU 加價）
levers.mechanism_en: Apple designs its own A-series (iPhone) and M-series (Mac/iPad) SoCs with an integrated Neural Engine + GPU. Unlike rivals who pay NVIDIA's ~75% gross margin for accelerators, Apple keeps the entire AI-compute margin internally and pays only TSMC's wafer price. Every on-device AI feature runs on silicon Apple already captures the value of — a structural cost/price advantage no merchant-GPU buyer has.
levers.mechanism_zh: Apple 自研 A 系列（iPhone）與 M 系列（Mac／iPad）SoC，內含整合 Neural Engine＋GPU。不同於對手要付 NVIDIA 約 75% 毛利買加速器，Apple 把整段 AI 算力利潤留在內部、只付台積電晶圓價。每個端側 AI 功能都跑在 Apple 已捕獲價值的矽上 — 是任何外購 GPU 買家都沒有的結構性成本／價格優勢。
levers.observability_en: Apple Silicon roadmap (A19/M5 Neural Engine TOPS), gross margin vs hardware peers, the absence of merchant-GPU COGS on Apple's P&L.
levers.observability_zh: Apple Silicon 路線圖（A19／M5 Neural Engine TOPS）、相對硬體同業的毛利、Apple 損益表上沒有外購 GPU COGS。
levers.source_zh: Apple 發表會與 10-K；台積電晶圓報價

levers.name_zh: 生態鎖定（約 24 億台活躍裝置）
levers.mechanism_en: ~2.4B active devices and a tightly-coupled iOS/macOS stack make switching expensive. On-device AI (Apple Intelligence, Private Cloud Compute, app intents) is exclusive to that stack, deepening lock-in: the more AI threads through Photos, Mail, Messages and Siri, the higher the switching cost and the more pricing latitude Apple holds across hardware AND Services.
levers.mechanism_zh: 約 24 億台活躍裝置與緊耦合的 iOS／macOS 堆疊讓轉換成本高昂。端側 AI（Apple Intelligence、Private Cloud Compute、App Intents）專屬於該堆疊、加深鎖定：AI 越深入照片、郵件、訊息與 Siri，轉換成本越高，Apple 在硬體「與」服務上握有的定價空間也越大。
levers.observability_en: Installed base growth, upgrade/retention rates, paid-subscription count, ecosystem switching surveys.
levers.observability_zh: 裝置基底成長、換機／留存率、付費訂閱數、生態轉換調查。
levers.source_zh: Apple 法說（裝置基底、訂閱）

levers.name_en: Apple-Intelligence-gated device mix-shift (Pro tier / upgrade pull)
levers.name_zh: Apple Intelligence 綁定的裝置組合上移（Pro 級／換機拉力）
levers.mechanism_en: Apple Intelligence requires newer silicon (A17 Pro / M-series and up), gating the best AI features to higher-ASP Pro models and pulling forward upgrades from older devices. The mix-shift toward Pro/Pro Max and a faster replacement cycle raise realized ASP and unit revenue independent of any list-price hike — AI as an upgrade catalyst.
levers.mechanism_zh: Apple Intelligence 需要較新的矽（A17 Pro／M 系列以上），把最好的 AI 功能綁定在 ASP 較高的 Pro 機型、並把舊機用戶的換機提前。組合往 Pro／Pro Max 移動＋更快的汰換週期，與牌價無關地推升已實現 ASP 與單位營收 — AI 作為換機催化劑。
levers.observability_en: iPhone Pro mix %, blended ASP, upgrade-cycle length, AI-feature attach by device tier.
levers.observability_zh: iPhone Pro 機型占比、混合 ASP、換機週期長度、各機型級別的 AI 功能附帶。
levers.source_zh: Apple 法說；通路／組合研究

levers.name_zh: 服務附帶（年化 $100B+ 變現面）
levers.mechanism_en: Services (App Store, iCloud, Apple Music/TV+, ads, payments) is a ~$100B+ high-margin annuity. AI features lift engagement and create new paid surfaces (more iCloud for Private Cloud Compute, AI-enhanced search/ads, future premium tiers), raising per-user monetization. AI doesn't sell as a SKU — it deepens the attach of a franchise Apple already prices.
levers.mechanism_zh: 服務（App Store、iCloud、Apple Music／TV+、廣告、支付）是年化 $100B+ 的高毛利年金。AI 功能提高互動、開出新的付費面（Private Cloud Compute 帶動更多 iCloud、AI 強化的搜尋／廣告、未來高階方案），拉高每用戶變現。AI 不是單獨販售的 SKU — 它加深 Apple 早已定價的事業附帶。
levers.observability_en: Services revenue & gross margin, paid subs, ARPU, iCloud/storage attach tied to PCC.
levers.observability_zh: 服務營收與毛利、付費訂閱、ARPU、綁定 PCC 的 iCloud／儲存附帶。

levers.name_en: Private Cloud Compute on own server silicon (edge → cloud, no merchant bill)
levers.name_zh: 自研伺服器矽上的 Private Cloud Compute（邊緣→雲、無外購帳單）
levers.mechanism_en: When a request exceeds on-device limits, Apple offloads to Private Cloud Compute running on Apple-Silicon servers (server-grade M-series), not bought NVIDIA GPUs. This extends the in-house value-capture from the edge into the cloud and pitches privacy as a differentiated, premium attribute — verticalizing the whole AI stack on Apple's own TSMC silicon.
levers.mechanism_zh: 當請求超出端側限制，Apple 卸載到跑在 Apple Silicon 伺服器（伺服器級 M 系列）上的 Private Cloud Compute，而非外購 NVIDIA GPU。這把內部價值捕獲從邊緣延伸到雲端，並把隱私當成差異化的高階屬性 — 在 Apple 自家台積電矽上垂直整合整個 AI 堆疊。
levers.observability_en: PCC server-silicon build-out, data-center capex disclosure, privacy positioning vs cloud-AI rivals.
levers.observability_zh: PCC 伺服器矽建置、資料中心 capex 揭露、相對雲端 AI 對手的隱私定位。
levers.source_zh: Apple PCC 揭露；資安研究

levers.name_zh: 評價兩極／依賴夥伴的前沿（價值捕獲拖累）
levers.mechanism_en: Apple Intelligence's launch was received as underwhelming, the Siri overhaul slipped into 2026, and the frontier leans on a partner (a reported Google Gemini deal) rather than Apple's own models. So Apple cannot charge for AI directly and risks value leaking to partners — it monetizes AI only INDIRECTLY through hardware/Services, capping realized AI pricing power. This is the #1 reason the read is HOLDING, not RAISING.
levers.mechanism_zh: Apple Intelligence 上市被認為不如預期、Siri 改版延到 2026，且前沿仰賴夥伴（傳出的 Google Gemini 合作）而非 Apple 自家模型。因此 Apple 無法直接對 AI 收費、且有價值外流給夥伴的風險 — 它只能透過硬體／服務「間接」變現 AI，壓住已實現 AI 定價權。這是判讀為 HOLDING 而非 RAISING 的頭號原因。
levers.observability_en: Apple Intelligence adoption/usage, Siri overhaul ship date, third-party-model dependence (Gemini), reviewer/consumer sentiment.
levers.observability_zh: Apple Intelligence 採用／使用率、Siri 改版上線日、第三方模型依賴（Gemini）、評測／消費者情緒。
levers.source_zh: Apple WWDC／上市報導；使用率調查

pricing.engine_note_en: Apple captures the AI-compute margin in-house (A/M-series Neural Engine, no merchant-GPU markup) and monetizes AI at the EDGE — through device mix-shift, ~2.4B-device ecosystem lock-in and Services attach rather than a per-token price — while the mixed Apple Intelligence reception and a partner-dependent frontier (Google Gemini for Siri) cap how much it can charge directly
pricing.engine_note_zh: Apple 把 AI 算力利潤留在內部（A／M 系列 Neural Engine、無外購 GPU 加價），並在邊緣變現 AI — 靠裝置組合上移、約 24 億台裝置的生態鎖定與服務附帶、而非按代幣計價 — 但 Apple Intelligence 評價兩極與依賴夥伴的前沿（Siri 用 Google Gemini）壓住它能直接收取的價格

items.what_en: iPhone/Mac/iPad revenue & blended ASP, Services revenue & gross margin, total margin — the hard floor; AI is NOT broken out anywhere.
items.what_zh: iPhone／Mac／iPad 營收與混合 ASP、服務營收與毛利、整體毛利 — 硬底；AI 在任何地方都未單獨揭露。

items.name_zh: Apple 法說會與裝置基底
items.what_en: Installed base (~2.4B), paid subscriptions, Services growth, Pro mix & upgrade commentary, AI-feature framing — where management hints at the AI story.
items.what_zh: 裝置基底（約 24 億）、付費訂閱、服務成長、Pro 組合與換機評論、AI 功能框定 — 管理層暗示 AI 故事的地方。

items.name_zh: Apple 股價（Nasdaq）＋分析師目標價
items.what_en: Live price, market cap, forward P/E vs mega-cap peers, consensus target — the market's read on the AI-upgrade super-cycle. Sentiment context, kept OUT of the score.
items.what_zh: 即時價格、市值、相對大型股的前瞻本益比、共識目標價 — 市場對 AI 換機超級循環的判讀。屬情緒情境，排除在分數外。

items.name_zh: Apple Intelligence 採用與使用率研究
items.what_en: Independent surveys of Apple Intelligence usage, Siri-overhaul timing, feature-by-feature reception — the cross-check on whether AI is actually pulling upgrades.
items.what_zh: 獨立的 Apple Intelligence 使用率調查、Siri 改版時程、逐功能評價 — 驗證 AI 是否真的拉動換機的交叉檢核。

items.name_zh: 台積電營收與先進製程揭露
items.what_en: N3/N2 mix, lead-customer commentary, Apple as ~25% of TSMC revenue — the supply base Apple anchors; note Apple's demand is logic wafers, NOT CoWoS/HBM.
items.what_zh: N3/N2 結構、首發客戶評論、Apple 約占台積電營收 25% — Apple 錨定的供給基底；注意 Apple 的需求是邏輯晶圓、非 CoWoS／HBM。

items.name_zh: Apple Silicon 路線圖與拆解
items.what_en: A/M-series Neural Engine TOPS, node (N3→N2), die size & packaging (InFO, unified memory) — the in-house value-capture lever's hard evidence.
items.what_zh: A／M 系列 Neural Engine TOPS、製程（N3→N2）、晶粒尺寸與封裝（InFO、統一記憶體）— 內部價值捕獲槓桿的硬證據。

items.name_zh: Private Cloud Compute 與資安揭露
items.what_en: PCC architecture, Apple-Silicon server build-out, privacy guarantees — the edge→cloud verticalization that keeps merchant GPUs off the bill.
items.what_zh: PCC 架構、Apple Silicon 伺服器建置、隱私保證 — 把外購 GPU 擋在帳單外的邊緣→雲垂直整合。

items.name_zh: Google–Apple 搜尋／Gemini 合作與反壟斷
items.what_en: The ~$20B/yr Google search-default payment and reported Siri-Gemini partnership — a material, AI-adjacent Services lever AND a regulatory risk.
items.what_zh: 約 $20B／年 Google 搜尋預設付款與傳出的 Siri-Gemini 合作 — 重大的、與 AI 相鄰的服務槓桿，「也是」監管風險。

estimates.method_zh: AI 可歸因的裝置組合＋服務增益（年化）
estimates.basis_en: Apple discloses NO AI revenue, so this ~$12B is a loose ESTIMATE of the slice of device mix-shift (Pro upgrade pull) + Services attach attributable to Apple Intelligence — diffuse and hard to isolate, deliberately the most uncertain headline of the six lenses. For the demand-side coverage view see /payback; for the on-device share backdrop see /compute.
estimates.basis_zh: Apple 不揭露任何 AI 營收，故此 ~$12B 是對「可歸因於 Apple Intelligence 的裝置組合上移（Pro 換機拉力）＋服務附帶」的粗略估計 — 擴散且難以切割，刻意是六鏡頭中最不確定的頭條。需求端覆蓋率視角見 /payback；端側占比背景見 /compute。

estimates.method_en: Services SEGMENT run-rate (disclosed; the AI monetization surface, NOT AI-only)
estimates.method_zh: 服務「分部」營收年化（揭露值；AI 變現面，非純 AI）
estimates.basis_en: Apple discloses the Services SEGMENT at a ~$100B+ annual run-rate (App Store, iCloud, Music/TV+, ads, payments). This is the high-margin surface AI plugs into — but it is the disclosed franchise, not AI-attributable. Carried for context; a DIFFERENT metric, so NOT averaged into the AI headline.
estimates.basis_zh: Apple 揭露服務「分部」年化約 $100B+（App Store、iCloud、Music／TV+、廣告、支付）。這是 AI 插入的高毛利面 — 但屬揭露事業、非 AI 可歸因。列為脈絡；屬「不同」metric，故不併入 AI 頭條平均。

estimates.method_en: Forward AI upgrade-cycle pull (if Apple Intelligence lands)
estimates.method_zh: 前瞻 AI 換機循環拉力（若 Apple Intelligence 兌現）
estimates.basis_en: If Apple Intelligence matures into a genuine reason-to-upgrade, the installed-base replacement pull could add an estimated ~$20B+ of incremental annual hardware revenue. A directional, scenario-dependent anchor — NOT booked, and contingent on adoption that is currently unproven.
estimates.basis_zh: 若 Apple Intelligence 成熟為真正的換機理由，裝置基底的汰換拉力可能新增估計 ~$20B+ 的年度硬體營收。是方向性、情境相依的錨點 — 未入帳，且取決於目前尚未驗證的採用率。

benefit.disclosure_note_en: Apple discloses NO AI revenue line — the ~$12B headline is a loose ESTIMATE of AI-attributable device-mix + Services uplift. Apple DOES disclose the Services SEGMENT (~$100B+ run-rate) which AI plugs into, but that is not AI-only. AI monetizes INDIRECTLY through hardware mix and Services attach, never as a priced SKU.
benefit.disclosure_note_zh: Apple 不揭露任何 AI 營收項 — ~$12B 頭條是對 AI 可歸因的裝置組合＋服務增益的粗略估計。Apple「有」揭露服務分部（年化 ~$100B+），AI 插入其中、但非純 AI。AI 透過硬體組合與服務附帶「間接」變現，從不作為定價的 SKU。

chain.role_zh: 端側 Apple Intelligence 旗艦
chain.note_en: 16-core Neural Engine runs Apple Intelligence on-device. The AI is integrated SoC + unified memory with InFO packaging — TSMC leading-edge LOGIC, but uniquely CoWoS/HBM-LIGHT, unlike any datacenter GPU.
chain.note_zh: 16 核 Neural Engine 在端側跑 Apple Intelligence。AI 是整合 SoC＋統一記憶體、InFO 封裝 — 台積電先進「邏輯」，但罕見地少用 CoWoS／HBM，與任何資料中心 GPU 不同。

chain.accelerator_en: M5 / M5 Pro / M5 Max (Mac & iPad)
chain.role_zh: 端側＋本地開發 AI 工作負載
chain.note_en: Bigger Neural Engine + GPU and large unified-memory pools let Macs run sizable local models — the high-ASP, high-margin half of the in-house value capture.
chain.note_zh: 更大的 Neural Engine＋GPU 與大容量統一記憶體讓 Mac 跑得動相當規模的本地模型 — 是內部價值捕獲中高 ASP、高毛利的一半。

chain.accelerator_en: Apple Silicon for Private Cloud Compute
chain.accelerator_zh: Private Cloud Compute 用 Apple Silicon
chain.role_en: Server-grade M-series for PCC (the cloud half)
chain.role_zh: PCC 的伺服器級 M 系列（雲端那半）
chain.note_en: Apple's only 'datacenter' silicon — server-grade M-series running PCC, NOT bought NVIDIA GPUs. Verticalizes the AI stack edge→cloud on Apple's own TSMC wafers; still essentially CoWoS-light.
chain.note_zh: Apple 唯一的「資料中心」矽 — 跑 PCC 的伺服器級 M 系列，而非外購 NVIDIA GPU。把 AI 堆疊在 Apple 自家台積電晶圓上邊緣→雲垂直整合；仍基本上少用 CoWoS。

chain.accelerator_zh: A20／M6 次世代（N2 首發客戶）
chain.role_zh: 次世代端側 AI 矽
chain.note_en: Apple is TSMC's lead/launch customer on N2 — first to buy 2nm at volume. Node/timing are roadmap-attributed; the point is Apple funds and de-risks each new node before the GPU crowd arrives.
chain.note_zh: Apple 是台積電 N2 的首發客戶 — 第一個量產買 2nm。製程／時程為路線圖歸因；重點是 Apple 在 GPU 群進場前替每個新製程買單並去風險。

chain.role_en: On-die AI accelerator blocks (no merchant GPU)
chain.role_zh: 晶粒上 AI 加速器區塊（無外購 GPU）
chain.note_en: The Neural Engine + GPU are blocks ON Apple's own SoC die — the reason Apple pays no NVIDIA markup. Every TOPS of on-device AI is TSMC silicon Apple already owns the margin on.
chain.note_zh: Neural Engine＋GPU 是 Apple 自家 SoC 晶粒「上」的區塊 — 這就是 Apple 不付 NVIDIA 加價的原因。每一 TOPS 端側 AI 都是 Apple 已握有利潤的台積電矽。

chain.accelerator_zh: C 系列自研數據機與無線
chain.note_en: Apple's C1/C2 modem moves another bought component in-house onto TSMC — extending vertical integration and adding to Apple's TSMC wafer pull, again logic-only, no CoWoS.
chain.note_zh: Apple 的 C1／C2 數據機把又一個外購零件移到內部、落在台積電上 — 延伸垂直整合並增加 Apple 對台積電的晶圓拉動，同樣只是邏輯、無 CoWoS。

silicon.tsmc_read_en: Apple is TSMC's single largest customer (~25% of revenue) and the lead/launch buyer on every new node — first on N3, first on N2 (A20/M6). But unlike the other five lenses, Apple's AI is ON-DEVICE: integrated SoC + unified LPDDR memory, InFO packaging, essentially NO CoWoS / HBM. So Apple is simultaneously the DEEPEST TSMC relationship of the six and the ONLY one outside the CoWoS bottleneck. It widens TSMC's leading-edge LOGIC/wafer base and funds & de-risks each node transition before the GPU crowd arrives, while the CoWoS/HBM ceiling that gates NVIDIA/AMD/Broadcom/Cerebras is not Apple's binding constraint. For TSMC, Apple is the volume anchor that pays for the bleeding edge; the GPU makers are the margin/scarcity layer stacked on top. If Apple's edge-AI super-cycle lands, it pulls N2 demand forward WITHOUT adding CoWoS contention — a structurally different, complementary axis of the same TSMC dependence.
silicon.tsmc_read_zh: Apple 是台積電單一最大客戶（約占營收 25%）、也是每個新製程的首發客戶 — N3 第一、N2（A20／M6）第一。但與其他五張鏡頭不同，Apple 的 AI 是「端側」：整合 SoC＋統一 LPDDR 記憶體、InFO 封裝、基本上不用 CoWoS／HBM。因此 Apple 同時是六者中與台積電關係「最深」的、也是「唯一」站在 CoWoS 瓶頸之外的。它擴大台積電先進「邏輯」晶圓基底、並在 GPU 群進場前替每次製程轉進買單與去風險，而卡住 NVIDIA／AMD／Broadcom／Cerebras 的 CoWoS／HBM 天花板並非 Apple 的綁定約束。對台積電而言，Apple 是替最尖端買單的「量的錨」；GPU 廠是疊在其上的利潤／稀缺層。若 Apple 的邊緣 AI 超級循環兌現，它會把 N2 需求往前拉、卻「不」增加 CoWoS 爭奪 — 是同一份台積電依賴中結構不同、互補的另一軸。

proxies.name_zh: 台積電（TSM）— 供給端 proxy
Alphabet（GOOGL）— Siri／Gemini 與搜尋合作夥伴

alerts.en: Concentration: ~100% of the AI compute behind this benefit is TSMC-fabbed, 2 link(s) critical — the CoWoS bottleneck TSMC controls is the binding constraint on growth.
alerts.zh: 集中度：撐起此利益的 AI 算力約 100% 由台積電製造，2 條鏈關鍵 — 台積電掌握的 CoWoS 瓶頸即成長綁定約束。

alerts.en: AI benefit (headline est.) ≈ $12.0B revenue_runrate — Apple discloses NO AI revenue line — the ~$12B headline is a loose ESTIMATE of AI-attributable device-mix + Services uplift. Apple DOES disclose the Services SEGMENT (~$100B+ run-rate) which AI plugs into, but that is not AI-only. AI monetizes INDIRECTLY through hardware mix and Services attach, never as a priced SKU.
alerts.zh: AI 利益（頭條估計）≈ $12.0B revenue_runrate — Apple 不揭露任何 AI 營收項 — ~$12B 頭條是對 AI 可歸因的裝置組合＋服務增益的粗略估計。Apple「有」揭露服務分部（年化 ~$100B+），AI 插入其中、但非純 AI。AI 透過硬體組合與服務附帶「間接」變現，從不作為定價的 SKU。

integrated_thesis.en: Apple monetizes AI indirectly — never as a priced SKU. Its realized-price engine is in-house Apple Silicon value capture: it pays TSMC wafer cost, not NVIDIA's merchant margin, then captures the spread through Pro-tier device mix and a ~$100B Services attach surface. Apple Intelligence is the upgrade lure; the ~$12B AI-attributable uplift is a loose estimate, not a disclosed line. Score 57.2 (HOLDING) reflects strong lock-in offset by a partner-dependent frontier. Critically for us: ~100% of that compute is TSMC-fabbed across A19 Pro/M5 on N3P and A20/M6 as N2 lead — but via InFO + unified memory, NOT CoWoS/HBM. Apple is our largest direct leading-edge customer, decoupled from the AI-CoWoS bottleneck.
integrated_thesis.zh: 蘋果以間接方式變現AI，從不作為定價SKU。其實現價格引擎是自研Apple Silicon的價值捕捉：支付台積電晶圓成本而非NVIDIA商用毛利，再透過Pro階機型組合與約1,000億美元服務附加面回收價差。Apple Intelligence是升級誘因；約120億美元AI貢獻僅為粗估而非揭露數字。評分57.2（持穩）反映強鎖定但前沿模型受夥伴牽制。對我方關鍵：該算力近100%由台積電代工，A19 Pro/M5用N3P、A20/M6為N2首發客戶，但走InFO＋統一記憶體，非CoWoS/HBM。蘋果是我方最大先進製程直接客戶，與AI-CoWoS瓶頸脫鉤。

pricing.en: Score 57.2, HOLDING. Top lever is in-house silicon (strength 70, T1): owning A/M-series removes the merchant-GPU markup so Apple banks the margin a rival pays NVIDIA. Reinforced by 2.4B-device lock-in (68) and Services attach (58). Realized price rises via Pro-tier mix-shift, not list price. The drag: a mixed-reception, partner-dependent frontier (34) caps how much AI value Apple itself captures versus leaks to Google/OpenAI.
pricing.zh: 評分57.2，持穩。首要槓桿為自研晶片（強度70，T1）：自有A/M系列省去商用GPU加價，蘋果賺取對手付給NVIDIA的毛利。輔以24億裝置鎖定（68）與服務附加（58）。實現價格靠Pro階組合上移而非定價牌價。拖累項：前沿模型評價分歧且依賴夥伴（34），限制蘋果自身對AI價值的捕捉，部分外洩給Google/OpenAI。

sources.en: Highest-signal: Apple 10-Q/10-K Products vs Services segment splits (read Services run-rate + gross-margin trend as the AI monetization proxy); earnings-call installed-base commentary; Apple Intelligence adoption/usage research for upgrade-pull evidence; TSMC advanced-node revenue disclosures for the supply mirror; teardowns + roadmap for node timing; and the Google–Apple search/Gemini deal + antitrust docket for the ~$20B Services lever at risk.
sources.zh: 最高訊號：蘋果10-Q/10-K產品與服務分部拆分（以服務運轉率與毛利率趨勢作為AI變現代理）；法說會裝置基數評論；Apple Intelligence採用與使用研究以驗證升級拉力；台積電先進製程營收揭露作供給鏡像；拆解與路線圖看製程時點；以及Google–Apple搜尋/Gemini協議與反壟斷案，追蹤約200億美元服務槓桿風險。

benefit.en: Apple discloses NO AI-only figure. The ~$12B headline is a low-confidence (T3) estimate of AI-attributable device-mix + Services uplift on a run-rate basis — treat as directional, not reported. The anchored fact is the ~$100B Services SEGMENT run-rate (T1, disclosed) into which AI plugs, but that is not AI-only. Forward upside: a further ~$20B upgrade-cycle pull IF Apple Intelligence lands — also low confidence. Monetization is indirect: hardware mix + Services attach, never a priced AI SKU.
benefit.zh: 蘋果未揭露任何純AI數字。約120億美元頭條為低信度（T3）的AI貢獻裝置組合＋服務增益運轉率估值——僅供方向參考，非揭露事實。可錨定者為約1,000億美元服務分部運轉率（T1，已揭露），AI插入其中，但非純AI。前瞻上行：若Apple Intelligence成功，另約200億美元升級週期拉力——同屬低信度。變現為間接：硬體組合＋服務附加，從非定價AI SKU。

silicon.en: This is the pillar that matters most to us: ~100% TSMC-fabbed, 2 critical links. A19 Pro on N3P and M5/M5 Pro/Max on N3 are critical-dependency today; A20/M6 makes Apple our N2 lead customer. Crucially, Apple uses InFO + LPDDR5X unified memory — NOT CoWoS/HBM. So Apple drives our leading-edge wafer demand and N2 ramp, but sits outside the CoWoS bottleneck that constrains the AI-accelerator cohort. Even Private Cloud Compute runs on own server silicon at our fabs.
silicon.zh: 此為對我方最關鍵支柱：近100%台積電代工，2條關鍵連結。A19 Pro用N3P、M5系列用N3，今為關鍵依賴；A20/M6使蘋果成為我方N2首發客戶。關鍵在蘋果採InFO＋LPDDR5X統一記憶體——非CoWoS/HBM。故蘋果驅動我方先進製程晶圓需求與N2量產，卻處於限制AI加速器群的CoWoS瓶頸之外。連Private Cloud Compute亦在我方廠以自研伺服器晶片運行。

tsmc_implication.en: Apple is a DIRECT leading-edge customer — our single largest N3 buyer and N2 anchor — not an indirect-via-NVIDIA one. The strategic point: Apple's AI demand flows to us through wafers (N3P→N2) and InFO packaging, NOT CoWoS. That makes Apple a CoWoS-decoupled volume base that smooths our leading-edge utilization while HBM/CoWoS capacity is rationed to GPU customers. The binding constraint on Apple's growth is its own upgrade-cycle demand and N2 yield/ramp timing, not packaging scarcity. Protect N2 launch slots; Apple's volume underwrites the node economics that the AI cohort also rides.
tsmc_implication.zh: 蘋果是直接先進製程客戶——我方最大N3買家與N2錨定客戶——而非經NVIDIA間接者。戰略要點：蘋果AI需求透過晶圓（N3P→N2）與InFO封裝流向我方，而非CoWoS。蘋果因此是CoWoS脫鉤的量能基礎，在HBM/CoWoS產能配給GPU客戶之際，平滑我方先進製程稼動率。蘋果成長的約束是自身升級週期需求與N2良率/量產時點，非封裝稀缺。應保障N2導入產能配置；蘋果量能支撐AI群亦依賴的製程經濟性。

scenarios.name_zh: 邊緣AI均價／服務重新定價
scenarios.trigger_en: Pro-tier mix lifts blended iPhone ASP +5% YoY and Services gross margin holds >74% on flat units over 2 consecutive quarters.
scenarios.trigger_zh: Pro階組合使iPhone綜合均價年增逾5%，且服務毛利於單位數持平下連兩季維持逾74%。

scenarios.trigger_en: iPhone unit growth re-accelerates to >8% YoY with Apple Intelligence cited as upgrade driver in adoption surveys; AI-attributable uplift re-rates above $20B.
scenarios.trigger_zh: iPhone出貨年增重回逾8%，採用調查指Apple Intelligence為升級主因；AI貢獻增益重估逾200億美元。

scenarios.trigger_en: Antitrust remedy cuts or voids the ~$20B Google payment and Siri leans further on Gemini; Services growth decelerates below 8% YoY.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 反壟斷裁罰削減或廢止約200億美元Google付款，Siri更依賴Gemini；服務成長年增降至8%以下。

scenarios.trigger_en: Apple Intelligence adoption stalls, replacement cycle lengthens beyond 4.5 years, and neither ASP nor Services attach lifts; read drifts toward ERODING.
scenarios.trigger_zh: Apple Intelligence採用停滯，換機週期延長逾4.5年，均價與服務附加皆未提升；研判轉向侵蝕。

falsification.en: Apple Intelligence shows measurable upgrade pull yet blended device ASP and Services margin stay flat — disproving that AI monetizes indirectly through mix.
falsification.zh: Apple Intelligence顯示可量化升級拉力，但綜合裝置均價與服務毛利仍持平——推翻AI透過組合間接變現之論。

falsification.en: Apple discloses or analysts converge on AI-attributable revenue materially below the ~$12B estimate, collapsing the benefit thesis.
falsification.zh: 蘋果揭露或分析師收斂的AI貢獻營收顯著低於約120億美元估值，瓦解效益論點。

falsification.en: Apple shifts material AI compute to non-TSMC fabs or merchant GPUs, breaking the ~100% TSMC-exposure and in-house-silicon value-capture premise.
falsification.zh: 蘋果將重要AI算力轉至非台積電廠或商用GPU，打破近100%台積電曝險與自研晶片價值捕捉前提。

watch.en: Google–Apple search/Gemini antitrust remedy ruling (the ~$20B Services lever at risk)
watch.zh: Google–Apple搜尋/Gemini反壟斷裁決（約200億美元服務槓桿風險）

watch.en: Apple Intelligence adoption & usage research vs upgrade-intent surveys
watch.zh: Apple Intelligence採用與使用研究對比升級意願調查

watch.en: Services segment run-rate & gross-margin trend in 10-Q
watch.zh: 10-Q服務分部運轉率與毛利率趨勢

watch.en: iPhone Pro-tier mix & blended ASP from earnings/teardowns
watch.zh: iPhone Pro階組合與綜合均價（法說會／拆解）

watch.en: N2 lead-customer slot commitments & A20/M6 tape-out timing
watch.zh: N2首發客戶產能承諾與A20/M6流片時點

watch.en: TSMC advanced-node (N3/N2) revenue mix as Apple supply mirror
watch.zh: 台積電先進製程（N3/N2）營收組合作為蘋果供給鏡像

watch.en: Private Cloud Compute server-silicon expansion disclosures
watch.zh: Private Cloud Compute伺服器晶片擴張揭露

cross_links.label_en: NVIDIA lens — the datacenter-GPU + CoWoS opposite of Apple's edge SoC; the two ends of TSMC demand
cross_links.label_zh: NVIDIA 鏡頭 — Apple 端側 SoC 的對立面（資料中心 GPU＋CoWoS）;台積電需求的兩端

cross_links.label_en: Bottleneck Radar — the CoWoS/HBM ceiling Apple uniquely sits OUTSIDE of
cross_links.label_zh: 瓶頸雷達 — Apple 罕見地站在其外的 CoWoS／HBM 天花板

cross_links.label_en: Pricing Power Radar — the foundry ASP side; Apple is TSMC's volume price anchor
cross_links.label_zh: 議價能力雷達 — 代工 ASP 端;Apple 是台積電的量價錨

cross_links.label_en: AI Compute Demand Radar — the accelerator demand Apple is NOT part of (on-device instead)
cross_links.label_zh: AI 算力需求雷達 — Apple 不屬於的加速器需求（改走端側）

cross_links.label_en: CapEx-to-Wafer Engine — the leading-edge logic wafers Apple anchors
cross_links.label_zh: CapEx→晶圓引擎 — Apple 錨定的先進邏輯晶圓

blind_spots_en: Apple discloses NO AI revenue — the ~$12B headline is a loose third-party-style estimate of AI-attributable device + Services uplift; only the Services segment (~$100B+, NOT AI-only) is disclosed.
Apple Intelligence reception has been mixed and the Siri overhaul slipped into 2026 — adoption and monetization are unproven.
Apple's frontier models lag and Siri reportedly leans on Google Gemini — a partner dependence and a value-capture leak.
The ~$20B/yr Google search-default payment is under antitrust pressure — a material, AI-adjacent Services risk not in this score.
Live AAPL/TSM/GOOGL proxies are sentiment context, kept OUT of the pricing-power score; the verdict is driven by the levers only.
blind_spots_zh: Apple 不揭露任何 AI 營收 — ~$12B 頭條為對 AI 可歸因裝置＋服務增益的粗略第三方式估計;只有服務分部（~$100B+、非純 AI）是揭露值。
Apple Intelligence 評價兩極、Siri 改版延到 2026 — 採用與變現尚未驗證。
Apple 自家前沿模型落後、Siri 傳出倚賴 Google Gemini — 是夥伴依賴與價值捕獲外流。
約 $20B／年的 Google 搜尋預設付款面臨反壟斷壓力 — 重大的、與 AI 相鄰的服務風險，未納入此分數。
即時 AAPL／TSM／GOOGL proxy 為情緒情境，排除在定價權分數外;判讀只由槓桿驅動。
